name: Rhubarb Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crumb topping in a medium bowl.
2. Cook the syrup mixture in a saucepan over medium heat until thick and clear.
3. Press half of the crumb mixture into a 9" x 13" pan. Cover with rhubarb. Pour the syrup mixture over that and top with the rest of the crumbs. Bake for one hour at 350°F. Serve warm with cream or ice cream.
